results.evidence: Code path verified: task-ac-sync-guard.sh -> ac-sync-dispatcher.sh -> ac-progress-sync.ts syncGitHubACProgress() -> github-ac-comment-poster.ts postACProgressComments(). Posts markdown progress comments with AC checkboxes.

Verified in jira-ac-checkbox-sync.ts lines 184-225 (ADF comment), jira-status-sync.ts postProgressComment() with dedup fingerprint, ac-progress-sync.ts syncJiraACProgress(). Live verified via JIRA epic SWE2E-227.
Code path verified: ac-progress-sync.ts syncAdoACProgress() -> AdoClient.addComment(). Also ado-ac-checkbox-sync.ts lines 172-191. ADO Epic #1367 + Issues #194, #208 created.
Code analysis: per user story ~3 calls (check + update + comment), total for 2 stories ~8-10 calls. Well under 100 limit.
Code analysis: postProgressComment=2 (1 GET dedup + 1 POST) + updateStatus=2 (1 GET transitions + 1 POST) = 4 max per story. Within specified limit.

notes: Verification-only increment. No code changes were made. All ACs verified via code path analysis and live platform testing (JIRA + ADO confirmed, GitHub rate-limited during test window).
